author: y4rr
content: Plan: Replace 4 elision sites in conformance_nn_norm_activation_loss.rs (lines 280, 331, 379, 1679). Use Phase 2's BatchNorm{1,2,3}d::set_running_mean/set_running_var + getters. For lazy-BN, also use num_features. Round-trip getter assert with tight tolerance (1e-9). Sabotage probe: assert against fixture-loaded values that differ from defaults (zeros/ones).
